baseline.observed: repair --count was documented as N>0 even though the command caps batches at 10 and emits a warning for larger requests.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because help_text did not contain the repair count cap rule.

selected_candidate.name: CLI help repair count cap documentation
selected_candidate.reason: Make the CLI help match the existing bounded repair batch behavior without changing the safety cap.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Help documents the repair count cap, bounded_count behavior remains green, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/bin/promptvault-cli.rs.
Focused help and repair cap tests were rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
